productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

Catalog highlights

  • Made in USA
  • Long lasting .75" solid maple wood
  • Laser engrave anywhere on the board
  • Finished with a FDA-approved food-safe oil
  • Includes a care instruction card

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Laser Engraving ▼

The catalog price includes a one position laser engraving up to the size stated in the catalog. Additional positions or laser size may be added for the prices shown. Setup Charges: Laser engraving: $ 70.00 (g) repeat: 6 mo N/C, 1 yr 50% Run Charges: Laser engraving: $ 1.50 (g) up to 3 s.i., $ .38 (g) per additional sq. in.

Laser Engraving Imprint Method

Laser Engraving (add'l location or size) ▼

The listed product price includes a one position laser engraving up to the size stated (If it shows no setup, the price does not include decoration.) Additional positions and/or sizes may be added for the prices shown. Laser Set up policy: exact repeat within 6 mo N/C; within 1-2 years 50%

Laser Engrave Run

Laser Engrave Run Charge

$2.00 (G) up to 4 sq. in.

Laser Engrave Charge +size

Laser Engrave Run Charge +size

$.40 (G) per square inch after 4 sq. in.

Personalization ▼

Individual names, initials, monograms or variable data can be directly lasered or digitally printed onto most of our products.

P-1

First line or name personalized

$5.50 each

P-2

Additional lines personalized

$4.50 per line

leather strap ▼

genuine leather strap, 15" long untied

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Less Than Minimum ▼

The minimum quantity of any standard inventory item is limited to one half of the first quantity listed for that item on our website or catalog. Please use the first quantity price as listed in the catalog and add $ 35.00 (G) for blank merchandise and $ 70.00 (G) for decorated merchandise. Setup discounts on repeat orders do not apply to less than minimum purchases.

LTM-B

Blank Less Than Minimum

$35.00 per order

LTM-D

Decorated Less Than Minimum

$70.00 per order

Non-Skid Feet ▼

These non-skid feet will add non-slip function to your cutting board. A special polymer mix foot is secured to the board with a stainless steel screw for long life and cleanliness. The feet will keep your board up off the counter and minimize possible food contamination as well as improve safety in a busy or unstable environment.

CB - Non Skid Feet

Proofs ▼

Proofs are available on request. To see your artwork at the actual size and location as it will appear on your finished order, request a paper or digital proof. First digital proof is free with all orders; all additional proofs are $ 7.00. To see the actual product with your artwork on it as it will be completed, request a sample proof ($ 60.00 per product plus cost of the item - 7 WD or less after receipt of artwork approval); unless the product has a die cast component, then it is $ 95.00 plus product cost and 12 working days after artwork approval.

Paper

Paper Proof

One proof is provided with each order free of charge. There is a charge for any subsequent proofs or changes.

$7.00 each

Sample

Sample Proof

An actual piece as you have ordered. 7 working days after receipt of order and artwork approval.

$70.00 each

Sample, dc

Sample Proof, die cast

An actual piece, die casted as you have ordered. 12 working days after receipt of order and artwork approval.

$95.00 each

Hanging Hole ▼

Drilled 5/16" hole for hanging in chosen location

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Wood Cutting Board - State. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 1495-st on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 15 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 25 units (per catalog line).
